title: Message: SR185 ImageMagick check failed
description:
i just try to confirm from wiki page:

To confirm that the ImageMagick plugin is working, execute the following query through Conductor's ISQL interface and check that the return value is 3.
select "IM XYtoMorton"(1,1)


And have this result.

Query result:
IM XYtoMorton
ANY
SQLState: 42001
Message: SR185: Undefined procedure DB.DBA.IM XYtoMorton

INFO: Version 07.20.3217-pthreads for Linux as of Sep 26 2017
# magick -version
Version: ImageMagick 7.0.7-3 Q16 x86_64 2017-09-19 http://www.imagemagick.org

virtuoso.ini
[Plugins]
#LoadPath = /usr/local/virtuoso-opensource/lib/virtuoso/hosting
#LoadPath = /usr/local/lib
#Load1    = plain, wikiv
#Load2    = plain, mediawiki
#Load3    = plain, creolewiki
Load1     = plain, im
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_images (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, image_data BLOB, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_images (id, image_data, description) VALUES (1, NULL, 'Test image 1');
INSERT INTO test_images (id, image_data, description) VALUES (2, X'image_data_2', 'Test image 2');
SELECT id FROM test_images WHERE image_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT 3 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_images WHERE id = 1);
key_bug_features: Undefined procedure when executing IM XYtoMorton query
